text.data-tooltip: ATLTLA · At Landing Low TRA · PDF §1.1.1
PDF §1.1.1 图2 · EICU CMD2 · 4-input AND · MLG_WOW ∧ ¬TR_Inhibited ∧ (Comm2_timer<30s) ∧ ¬TR_Deployed · 用于解锁TLS+吊挂锁 · ⚠ adapter 与 PDF 有偏差 (Counter F1)
PDF §1.1.2 图3 · EICU CMD3 · 4-input AND · (Engine_Running∨TRCU_menu) ∧ MLG_WOW ∧ ¬TR_Inhibited ∧ APWTLA · 用于115VAC三相电给TRCU · ⚠ adapter 用 atltla 不是 apwtla (Counter F2)
PDF §1.1.2 图4 · TR_Command3_Enable (FADEC→EICU reset) · ¬[(Stowed_Locked_1s ∧ TRA≥-1.4 ∧ 115VAC@TRCU) ∨ E-TRAS_OverTemp] · 用于重置CMD3断三相电 · ⚠ adapter 方向反了 (Counter F3)

PDF §1.1.3 图5 · FADEC Deploy CMD1 · 6-input AND · (Eng_Run∨Maint) ∧ ¬TR_Inhibited ∧ Unlock_Confirmed ∧ TR_WOW ∧ (N1k≤limit) ∧ (TRA<-11.74) · 命令TRCU展开反推 · ⚠ adapter 多 2 项 tr_command3_enable+tr_deployed 缺 ¬tr_inhibited (Counter F4)
PDF §2 Step 7 · FADEC Stow CMD1 · AND · TRA≥-1.4 ∧ (N1k≤Stow_limit) ∧ Engine_Running ∧ ¬Deploy_CMD · 命令TRCU收起反推 (Counter F5 minor)
